M0800A_WRSNG_STG_2_ULCRS_NUM M0800A_WRSNG_STG_2_ULCRS_NUM M0800A Pressure Ulcers - Number of Worsening Stage 2 Pressure Ulcers Since Admission - The data in this column indicates the current number of Stage 2 pressure ulcers at discharge, that were not present or were at a lesser stage on admission. CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the current number of Stage 2 pressure ulcers at discharge, that were not present or were at a lesser stage on admission.
398 M0800B_WRSNG_STG_3_ULCRS_NUM
